name: Raiders of the Lost Ark
description:
Raiders of the Lost Ark is a single-player, top-down adventure game adapting the narrative of the film. The player controls Indiana Jones, navigating diverse environments such as jungles, ancient temples, bustling marketplaces, and subterranean tombs. The core gameplay revolves around exploration, puzzle-solving, combat, and item collection. 

Indiana Jones can move in four directions and must overcome obstacles including booby traps, environmental hazards (collapsing floors, rolling boulders, bottomless pits), and enemy encounters. Enemies consist of Thuggees, Nazi soldiers, Arab swordsmen, and supernatural entities. Indy's primary weapon is his whip, used for both combat and traversal. He also has access to a limited number of grenades, offering ranged explosive power. 

Puzzles require observation, manipulation of the environment, and the use of collected items. These might involve pushing blocks, finding hidden switches, deciphering hieroglyphs, or using specific items in particular locations. Key items are scattered throughout the levels, necessary to progress the story and overcome obstacles. These items include but are not limited to: the Staff of Ra, the Headpiece of the Staff of Ra, maps, keys, and torches. 

The game world is interconnected, often requiring backtracking to previously visited areas with newly acquired items to unlock new paths. Health is represented by a health bar that depletes upon taking damage from enemies and hazards. If the health bar reaches zero, the player dies and must restart from the last checkpoint.

The ultimate goal is to locate the Ark of the Covenant before the Nazis, culminating in a climactic confrontation within the Well of Souls and the subsequent transport of the Ark. The game follows the general plot of the movie but incorporates some changes and expansions to fit the gameplay format, with multiple levels representing the various locations seen in the film.

controls.c: Interact with environment (pick up items, activate switches, etc.)
